title: Molecular Dynamics Simulations of Coronavirus Papain-Like Proteases: Insights into Conformational Equilibrium and Inter-Domain Allosterism
author: Rocha, Gerd Bruno
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
All data is in a zipped folder named "all_data.zip". In this zipped folder, there are three main folders: Crystallographic Structures and Parametrization, DM, and PCA. The molecular dynamics simulation calculations performed using the NAMD program for the SARS-CoV-2 PLpro protein with and without zinc and for SARS-CoV-1 with and without zinc are found in the DM folder. Within these three main folders, there are subfolders where the data is located.  
     
  Descriptions of files in the DM folder  
     
  + subfolder PLpro SARS-CoV-1 without zinc (PLpro1_not_zinc)  
     
   -        PLpro1-restricao-1.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1-ref.pdb: PDB file used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1-backbone: PDB file with restrictions on the protein backbone used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1.prmtop: topology file.  
   -        1_PLpro_MIN.conf: Configuration file used in the minimization protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        1_PLpro_MIN.log: Output for minimization with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        2_PLpro_MIN.conf: Configuration file used in the minimization protocol without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        2_PLpro_MIN.log: Output for minimization without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        3_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        3_PLpro_DM.log: Output for molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        4_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions on the protein backbone atoms.  
   -        4_PLpro_DM.log: Output for molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions on the protein backbone atoms.  
   -        5_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        5_PLpro_DM.log: Output molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        6_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the pre-production molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol.  
   -        6_PLpro_DM.log: Output for pre-production molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol.  
     
  + subfolder PLpro SARS-CoV-1 with zinc (PLpro1_zinc)  
     
   -        PLpro1-retrizn.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions on the zinc finger of the protein used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1-retrizn-1.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions on the protein's zinc finger used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1_ZAFF_solv.pdb: PDB file with the parameters for the simulation.  
   -        PLpro1_ZAFF_solv.prmtop: topology file.  
   -        PLpro1zn-backbone.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions on the protein backbone used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1zn-backbone-1.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions on the protein backbone used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1zn-ref.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1zn-restricao-1.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        1_PLpro_MIN.conf: Configuration file used in minimization protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        1_PLpro_MIN.log: Output for minimization with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        2_PLpro_MIN.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation minimization protocol without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        2_PLpro_MIN.log: Output for minimization file without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        3_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        3_PLpro_DM.log: Output for molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        4_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions on the zinc finger.  
   -        4_PLpro_DM.log: Output for molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions on the zinc finger.  
   -        5_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions on the protein backbone atoms.  
   -        5_PLpro_DM.log: Output of the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions on the protein backbone.  
   -        6_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        6_PLpro_DM.log: Output for molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        7_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the pre-production molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol.  
   -        7_PLpro_DM.log: Output for pre-production molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol.  
     
  + subfolder PLpro SARS-CoV-1 without zinc (PLpro2_notzn)  
     
   -        PLpro2-backbone.pdb: PDB file with restriction on the protein backbone used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro2-backbone-1.pdb: PDB file with restriction on the protein backbone used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro2-ref.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro2-restricao-1.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        1_PLpro2_MIN.conf: Configuration file used in minimization protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        1_PLpro2_MIN.log: Output fo minimization protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        2_PLpro2_MIN.conf: Configuration file used in minimization protocol without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        2_PLpro2_MIN.log: Output for minimization without harmonic restrictions  
   -        3_PLpro2_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        3_PLpro2_DM.log: Output for molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        4_PLpro2_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions on the protein backbone atoms.  
   -        4_PLpro2_DM.log: Output for molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions on the protein backbone atoms.  
   -        5_PLpro2_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        5_PLpro2_DM.log: Output for molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        6_PLpro2_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the pre-production molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol.  
   -        6_PLpro2_DM.log: Output for pre-production molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol.  
     
  + SARS-CoV-2 subfolder with zinc (PLpro2_zinc)  
     
   -        PLpro2zn-restricao-1.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro2zn-ref.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro2zn-backbone-1.pdb: PDB file with restriction on the protein backbone used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro2zn-backbone.pdb: PDB file with restriction on the protein backbone used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro2-retrizn-1.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions on the zinc finger of the protein used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro2-retrizn.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions on the zinc finger of the protein used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1-retrizn.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions on the zinc finger of the protein used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1-retrizn-1.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions on the protein's zinc finger used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1_ZAFF_solv.pdb: PDB file with the parameters for the simulation.  
   -        PLpro1_ZAFF_solv.prmtop: topology file.  
   -        PLpro1zn-backbone.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions on the protein backbone used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1zn-backbone-1.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions on the protein backbone used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1zn-ref.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        PLpro1zn-restricao-1.pdb: PDB file with harmonic restrictions used in molecular dynamics simulation.  
   -        1_PLpro_MIN.conf: Configuration file used in the minimization protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        1_PLpro_MIN.log: Output for minimization with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        2_PLpro_MIN.conf: Configuration file used in the minimization protocol without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        2_PLpro_MIN.log: Output for minimization without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        3_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        3_PLpro_DM.log: Output for molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions.  
   -        4_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions on the zinc finger.  
   -        4_PLpro_DM.log: Output for molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions on the zinc finger.  
   -        5_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions on the protein backbone atoms.  
   -        5_PLpro_DM.log: Output for molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol with harmonic restrictions on the protein backbone.  
   -        6_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        6_PLpro_DM.log: Output for molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol without harmonic restrictions.  
   -        7_PLpro_DM.conf: Configuration file used in the pre-production molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol.  
   -        7_PLpro_DM.log: Output for pre-production molecular dynamics simulation equilibration protocol.  
     
     
  Descriptions of files in the folder named Crystallographic_Structures_and_Parametrization  
     
   -        leap.log: Output generated by TLEAP.  
   -        PLpro1.pdb: Zinc-free PLpro SARS-CoV-1 PDB file.  
   -        PLpro1.prmtop: Topology file used for molecular dynamics simulations.  
   -        PLpro1.rst7: Zinc-free PLpro SARS-CoV-1 atomic coordinate file  
   -        PLpro1_1.pdb: PLpro SARS-CoV-1 PDB file without solvated zinc.  
   -        PLpro_tleap.in: TLEAP input file used to build the system.  
   -        PLpro_tleap.out: Output with program execution information.  
   -        PLpro1_zn.pdb: PDB file of PLpro SARS-CoV-1 with zinc.  
   -        PLpro1_ZAFF_dry.inpcrd: File with the initial coordinates of all atoms in the system.  
   -        PLpro1_ZAFF_dry.pdb: PDB file of PLpro SARS-CoV-1 with zinc.  
   -        PLpro1_ZAFF_dry.prmtop: Topology file used for molecular dynamics simulations.  
   -        PLpro1_ZAFF_solv.inpcrd: File with the initial coordinates of all atoms in the system for the solvated system.  
   -        PLpro1_ZAFF_solv.pdb: PDB file of PLpro SARS-CoV-1 with solvated zinc.  
   -        PLpro1_ZAFF_solv.prmtop: Topology file used for molecular dynamics simulations.  
   -        PLpro1_ZAFF_tleap.in: TLEAP input file used to build the system.  
   -        PLpro1_ZAFF_tleap.out: Output with program execution information.  
   -        PLpro2.pdb: Zinc-free PLpro SARS-CoV-2 PDB file.  
   -        PLpro2.prmtop: Topology file used for molecular dynamics simulations.  
   -        PLpro2.rst7: Zinc-free PLpro SARS-CoV-2 atomic coordinate file  
   -        PLpro2_1.pdb: PDB file of PLpro SARS-CoV-2 without solvated zinc.  
   -        PLpro_tleap.in: TLEAP input file used to build the system.  
   -        PLpro_tleap.out: Output with program execution information.  
   -        PLpro2_zn.pdb: PDB file of PLpro SARS-CoV-2 with zinc.  
   -        PLpro2_ZAFF_dry.inpcrd: File with the initial coordinates of all atoms in the system.  
   -        PLpro2_ZAFF_dry.pdb: PDB file with the initial coordinates of all atoms in the system.  
   -        PLpro2_ZAFF_dry.prmtop: Topology file for the starting coordinates of all atoms in the system.  
   -        PLpro2_ZAFF_solv.inpcrd: File with the initial coordinates of all atoms in the system for the solvated system.  
   -        PLpro2_ZAFF_solv.pdb: PDB file of PLpro SARS-CoV-2 with solvated zinc.  
   -        PLpro2_ZAFF_solv.prmtop: Topology file used for molecular dynamics simulations.  
   -        PLpro2_ZAFF_tleap.in: TLEAP input file used to build the system.  
   -        PLpro2_ZAFF_tleap.out: Output with program execution information.  
     
  + File descriptions in PCA folder  
     
   -        evecs.dat: File with the atomic coordinates used to reconstruct the free energy profiles for each system, the projections on the first three eigenvectors, PC1, PC2, PC3.  
   -        project.dat: Files with the vectors that were projected into the free energy profiles, the average projection of each system was projected for a better visualization of the displacement of the structural differences in each system.  
   -        "Figure"12.png: figures related to the projections of PC1x PC2, which are the highest amplitude and intrinsic movements of the protein.  
   -        "Figure"13.png: figures related to the projections of PC1x PC3, which are the most internal movements of the protein.  
   -        "Figure"23.png: figures related to the projections of PC2x PC3, which are the most internal movements of the protein.  
   -        "clusters".pdb: Clusters most representative of the molecular dynamics simulation for each system.  
   -        "cluster".dat: Files with clustering information.  
   -        "cluster".sum: Files with clustering information.
